scope: Sweep batch (8 docs): 4 R34-dropped (73,71,41,42) + 4 new (18,39,44,51). Lean doc-centric+verify.

cap_probe.note: Window clear; lean config at 8 docs sustainable.

verify_summary.note: Consumer-set findings upheld with both-form greps + positive controls; non-consumer-set findings (citation/value/count) passed through. module_18 + module_51 Criticals independently re-derived.

per_doc.label: module_73
per_doc.key: Spine correct; R33 advisory (q73 wood/woodfuel populate) CONFIRMED. Major superseded residue formula + Section 11 citation-drift cluster (stale lines/values 2.5->2.7, 74). 4 Minor.

per_doc.label: module_71
per_doc.key: Mostly accurate. Major active-eq count 4->5. Minor: code-file count 7->9; vm_prod_reg 'from M70' -> declared M17 (verifier-UPHELD producer attribution).

per_doc.label: module_41
per_doc.key: Solid. Major scaling value 10e4->1e4 (scaling.gms:8); Minor omitted q41_cost_AEI.scale + line counts.

per_doc.label: module_42
per_doc.key: Default all_sectors_aug13 + producer/consumer sets (vm_watdem->M43, vm_water_cost->M11) correct. Major '195 countries'->249; sets.gms cite for 5-sector list. 2 Minor.

per_doc.label: module_18
per_doc.key: 2 CRITICAL consumer-set (verifier-UPHELD + meta-checked): vm_prod_reg(kres) consumed externally only by M21 via k_notrade (selfsuff_reduced/equations.gms:19) - 6 wrongly-listed modules read kcr/kap/kli_rum slices; vm_res_biomass_ag/bg mislabeled Internal though M50 reads them. Major vm_res_recycling omits M51 + phantom P/K. Root cause: shared vm_prod_reg slice conflation.

per_doc.label: module_39
per_doc.key: High-accuracy (producer M10/M12, consumer M11-sole verified). 3 Minor: unit '17MER' in test comment (CHECKER LEAD confirmed); non-GAMS code block; param-vs-mechanism. vm_cost_landcon unit lead confirmed.

per_doc.label: module_44
per_doc.key: Spine accurate (complete vm_bv producer set, vm_cost_bv_loss->M11). Major: lists removed realization bii_target_apr24 as live; Scenario-3 s44_start_year=2025 aborts. 2 Minor.

per_doc.label: module_51
per_doc.key: 1 CRITICAL (verifier-UPHELD + meta-checked): im_maccs_mitigation declared M57/maccs (on_aug22/declarations.gms:13) not M56. 2 Major: M57 omitted as direct vm_emissions_reg consumer; phantom direct M14 dep. 'M51 reads vm_area' advisory REFUTED (that was M32/R33).

criticals_meta_checked.claim: vm_prod_reg(kres) external consumer = M21 only (via k_notrade)
criticals_meta_checked.evidence: literal vm_prod_reg(i2,kres) only in M18's own eqs (owns the slice); M21 selfsuff_reduced/equations.gms:19 reads vm_prod_reg(k_notrade) and k_notrade includes res_cereals/res_fibrous/res_nonfibrous; M20/38/50/70/71 read kcr/kap/kli_rum

gate.self_healed: 8 bare-path citations (6 in module_18, 2 in module_51) expanded to full modules/NN_name/ paths; stash-tested baseline; 0 reverts

key_learnings: Lean doc-centric+verify holds steady (R35: 4 docs/0.98M, R36: 8 docs/1.87M, both clean ~1.5min gap) - this is the sustainable sweep config under the 5h rolling rate.
Verifier upheld all 8 consumer-set findings with positive controls and the 2 Criticals survived a manual meta-check - the verify layer reliably scales the by-hand consumer-set verification.

Producer/declaration attribution errors are common (vm_prod_reg 'from M70', im_maccs_mitigation 'M56', vm_carbon_stock 'M52') - the DECLARED-vs-POPULATED-vs-READ distinction (G2 class) is a recurring doc-bug vein across the sweep.
